title: 2月 13天New Zealand 南島自駕登山攝影行程求評

replies.msg:
第10-13日仲未諗好. 麻煩大家指點下 返黎再出返個攝影遊記

Day 1 5/2/2018
13:30 Christchurch - Air Port Arrived 　 　 　
15:00 Christchurch - Pick up car and shopping 　 　 　
18:00 Christchurch - Drive to Mt Sunday Summi
20:00 Mt Sunday Summi - Arrived 　
　 　
Day 2 6/2/2018
8:00 Mt Sunday Summi - Drive to Tekapo
11:00 Tekapo - Arrived 　 　 　
13:00 Mt. John - Arrived 　 　 　
20:00 The Church of the Good Shepherd - Arrived/Stargazing 　 　 　
0:00 Lake Mcgregor - Arrived/Stargazing 　
　 　
Day 3 7/2/2018
8:00 Tekapo - Drive to Hooker Valley
11:00 Hooker Valley Track Entrance - Arrived and trek to hooker lake
13:00 Hooker Lake - Arrived 　 　 　
17:00 Hooker Valley - Trekking to Mueller Hut
19:00 Mueller Hut - Stay/Stargazing 　
　 　
Day 4 8/2/2018
9:00 Mueller Hut - Back to Hooker Valley 　
10:00 Hooker Valley - Arrived 　 　 　
12:00 Tasman Lake - Arrived 　 　 　
14:00 Hooker Valley - Drive to Wanaka
16:00 Wanaka - Arrived 　 　 　
17:00 Wanaka Tree - photograph 　 　 　
20:00 Eely Point Recreational Reserve - Sunset 　
　 　
Day 5 9/2/2018
6:00 Mount Iron - Sunrise/Stargazing
8:00 Wanaka - Trekking to Mt Roy
12:00 Mount Roy - Back to Wanaka
15:00 Wanaka - Drive to Queenstown
17:00 Queenstown - Arrived and walk around 　 　 　
21:00 Queenstown - Gardens/Bob's Cove - Sunset 　 　 　
22:00 12 Mile Delta - Stay/Stargazing
　 　
Day 6 10/2/2018
6:00 12 Mile Delta - Sunrise/Stargazing 　 　 　
8:00 Queenstown - SkyDiving/ walk around 　 　 　
12:00 MT Alfred/Ben Lomond - Trekking
20:00 Moke Lake - Stay/Stargazing 　
　 　
Day 7 11/2/2018

8:00 Moke Lake - Drive to Glenorchy 　 　 　
12:00 Glenorchy - SkyDiving 　 　 　
16:00 Queenstown - Drive to Te Anau
19:00 Te Anau - Stay 　 　 　

Day 8 12/2/2018
7:00 Te Anau - Drive to Milford Sound
10:00 Milford Sound - Arrived and walk around 　 　 　
11:00 Scenic Cruises 　 　 　 　
15:00 Milford Sound - Drive toNugget Point Lighthouse
21:00 Nugget Point - Lighthouse Arrived/Stargazing
　 　 　
Day 9 13/2/2018
9:00 Nugget Point Lighthouse - Leave 　 　 　
12:00 Tunnel Beach - Arrived and walk around 　 　
13:00 Dunedin/St Clair Beach - Arrived and walk around 　 　 　
15:00 Dunedin/St Clair Beach - Drive to Sandymount Recreation Reserve
16:00 Sandymount Recreation Reserve - Arrived and walk around 　 　 　
18:00 Sandymount Recreation Reserve - Drive to Katiki Point Lighthouse
20:00 Meoraki Boulder/Katiki Point Lighthouse - Arrived/Stargazing 　 　
　
Day 10 14/2/2018
9:00 Meoraki Boulder - Leave 　 　 　
12:00 Timaru - Stay 　 　
　
Day 11 15/2/2018 　
9:00 Timaru - Leave 　 　 　 　
12:00 Castle Hill - Stay 　 　 　
16:00 Castle Hill - Drive to Christchurch 　 　 　
18:00 Christchurch 　 　 　 　

Day 12 16/2/2018 　
9:00 Christchurch 　 　 　 　
16:00 Christchurch Air Port - Return Car 　
　 　
Day 13 17/2/2018 　
6:50 Christchurch Air Port - Leave
有冇人可以比下意見

Milford sound個人覺得一般 由其係來回既車程太長
不過路途中既風景同個隧道係幾正
